title: Onboarding New Employees
content: The onboarding process for new employees consists of three main phases. Phase 1: Pre-arrival paperwork and system setup. Phase 2: First-day orientation, which includes a company overview, a tour of the office, and introductions to the team. Phase 3: A 90-day integration plan with regular check-ins.

title: Expense Reporting Policy
content: All expenses must be submitted through the company's expense portal within 30 days of the purchase. A valid receipt is required for all expenses over $25. For travel expenses, pre-approval is required for flights and accommodations. Mileage for personal car usage is reimbursed at the standard federal rate.

title: IT Support Requests
content: For IT support, please submit a ticket through the IT helpdesk portal. For urgent issues, you can call the IT hotline at x5555. The IT department aims to respond to all tickets within 4 business hours. Please provide as much detail as possible in your request, including screenshots if applicable.
